scores.brief_assessment: An exceptionally well-curated reference that provides concrete, directly-applicable patterns (directory layout, example file conventions, test boilerplate, cleanup table, CLI commands) for Mongosh Grove examples using proprietary internal APIs and conventions not available in training data. Minor token overhead in the full test file boilerplate, but it's the canonical pattern an agent needs to replicate.
scores.novel_info: The novel details here are the proprietary Grove test harness internals: the custom `Expect.outputFromExampleFiles().withDbName().shouldMatch()` API chain, the `describeWithSampleData` utility, `makeTempFileForTesting.js`, and the comma-operator pattern for multi-step mongosh examples — none of which are standard Jest or public mongosh conventions. A reviewer should also fact-check the specific snipped output path (`content/code-examples/tested/command-line/mongosh/…`) and the `.snippet.<name>.js` file-naming convention used in `literalinclude` directives, as these appear to be internal build-pipeline contracts.
